series_metadata.series_description: Documents, files, or data created, obtained, or received by the Auditor of State during the course of an audit that are used by the Auditor of State but are not necessary for the Auditor of State to maintain to support the conclusions made in an audit report. These records do not become part of the audit workpapers and are not a record described in the Audit Workpapers retention schedule.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: no longer of administrative value ; Paper: no longer of administrative value
